profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Puri Sentul Permai Tbk engages in hotel and restaurant businesses in Indonesia. The company operates restaurant under the Kedaton 8 Hotel and Kedaton 8 Xpress Rest Area KM 19 name; and restaurant under the Fu Hot Pot & Grill Restaurant name. PT Puri Sentul Permai Tbk was founded in 2008 and is based in Sentul, Indonesia.
